title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: English lavender essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. When applied topically, the oil can help reduce inflammation in the affected area, alleviating pain and discomfort associated with swollen knees. Additionally, lavender's calming effects can promote relaxation, which can further aid in reducing swelling by allowing the body to naturally recover from injury or strain.
